title: Happy Ghast Speedy Ride
description: Add craftable harness that boost Happy Ghast Fly speed when Equiped
body:
# THIS DATAPACK HAS BEEN ARCHIVE:
  I decided to archive this datapack infavor for which i think a way more better version which is the [Ghast Pedal](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ghast-pedal).

#
**This Datapack add Craftable Harness for Happy Ghast that boost its flying speed when equip at  reasonable speed not ridiculously fast to account for game balance**

✅ Java REALM Compatible

This pack has 3 levels of flying speed 25%, 50% and 75%(max fly speed) allowing you to choose which speed suits to your need.
## Crafting Recipes
**+25% Fly Speed**

![25%](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8786d0ed514eaab77a16d7c12e76f8dd3383f688.png)

- x1 Harness(Any Color)
- x1 Wind Charge
- x1 Lapis Lazuli

**+50% Fly Speed**

![50%](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5105f5c0f3debf0fa2eec18e449e01797d7885ef.png)

- x1 Harness(Any Color)
- x2 Wind Charge
- x1 Lapis Lazuli

**+75% Fly Speed**

![75%](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d005a4f8e2b23685340a9370f3a174347d47f83.png)

- x1 Harness(Any Color)
- x1 Wind Charge
- x1 Blaze Powder
- x1 Lapis Lazuli

**For suggestion and feedback just DM me on my discord: yukira2018**


_This pack doesn't use Custom Enchantments due to its still on Experimental phase and it is annoying click "I know what im doing" everytime i play the world._
